zh.lifeSummary: 當Emeline de Wissocq於1041年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，她的父親Arthur II DE WISSOCQ40歲，母親Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH32歲。她於1058年與Engilbert de Fiennes結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1106年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Emily
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

variants.name: Emma
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

variants.name: Emmeline
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

en.lifeSummary: When Emeline de Wissocq was born in 1041, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Arthur II DE WISSOCQ, was 40 and her mother, Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH, was 32. She married Engilbert de Fiennes in 1058. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1106, in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emeline de Wissocq est née en 1041, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Arthur II DE WISSOCQ, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Engilbert de Fiennes en 1058. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1106, à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emeline de Wissocq 1041 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arthur II DE WISSOCQ 40 und ihre Mutter Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH 32. Sie hat 1058 Engilbert de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1106 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emeline de Wissocq è nata il nel 1041 nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Arthur II DE WISSOCQ, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Engilbert de Fiennes nel 1058. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1106, nel Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emeline de Wissocqが1041年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Arthur II DE WISSOCQは40歳，母Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCHは32歳であった。1058年にEngilbert de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1106年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emeline de Wissocq(이)가 1041년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arthur II DE WISSOCQ(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1058년 Engilbert de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1106년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emeline de Wissocq nasceu em 1041, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Arthur II DE WISSOCQ, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Engilbert de Fiennes em 1058. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1106, em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emeline de Wissocq родилась в 1041 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Arthur II DE WISSOCQ было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Engilbert de Fiennes в 1058 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1106 г. в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emeline de Wissocq nació en 1041, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Arthur II DE WISSOCQ, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Constance DE BERGHES-SAINT VINOCH, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Engilbert de Fiennes en 1058. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1106, en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
